title: Create: Encased Deployable
description: This datapack aims to add deployer compatibility to the Create: Encased Mod!
body:
What this data pack does:

This pack makes ALL items in the Create: Encased mod craftable via deployers and the right click mechanic built into base Create

Place original variation on the ground and right click using manual application whilst holding the correct Ingot/Block to change variations

OR

Just put the original variation into a deployer mechanism with the deployer holding the correct Ingot/Block to change variations 



HIGHLY RECCOMMEND USING JEI OR SIMILAR MODS TO VIEW RECIPES!
